name: Richie Rich Anklet
details:
Product Description

Step into every moment with confidence through the Richie Rich Anklet. Designed with a sleek black-toned chain, glossy Black Obsidian beads and metallic Pyrite accents, this anklet combines a bold minimal look with meaningful crystal symbolism.

Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, confidence and ambition, while Black Obsidian is linked with grounding and protection from negative energy. Together, they create Studd Muffyn’s signature Richie Rich combination of abundance and protection.

The compact crystal arrangement keeps the design refined and easy to style. Wear it with jeans, trousers, dresses or ethnic outfits for a subtle yet powerful finishing touch.

Why Choose It?

Prosperity Meets Protection:
Combines Pyrite’s wealth-inspired symbolism with the grounding and protective qualities traditionally associated with Black Obsidian.

Minimal Crystal Arrangement:
Features two glossy black beads placed between metallic Pyrite accents for a balanced and distinctive appearance.

Sleek Black-Toned Chain:
The fine chain gives the anklet a clean and contemporary look without appearing heavy.

Secure Clasp Closure:
The fastening keeps the anklet securely positioned around the ankle.

Easy Everyday Styling:
Its neutral black and metallic colour combination pairs effortlessly with casual, western and festive outfits.

Key Highlights
Pyrite and Black Obsidian crystal combination
Two polished Black Obsidian centre beads
Metallic Pyrite accent beads
Sleek black-toned chain
Secure clasp fastening
Lightweight and minimal design
Prosperity and protection-inspired symbolism
Suitable for everyday styling and gifting
Crafted With
Pyrite Accents

Metallic Pyrite beads frame the central design and add an earthy, premium finish. Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, ambition, confidence and opportunities.

Black Obsidian Beads

Two smooth, polished Black Obsidian beads form the central highlight. Their deep black colour gives the anklet a bold appearance while symbolising protection and grounding.

Black-Toned Chain

The fine metallic chain creates a sleek foundation that complements the darker crystal arrangement.

Secure Clasp

The clasp closure helps the anklet remain comfortably fastened while making it easy to wear and remove.

Crystal Significance
Pyrite — The Crystal of Prosperity

Pyrite is traditionally regarded as a symbol of abundance, financial growth and confidence. It is often worn as an intention-based crystal by people working towards success, ambition and new opportunities.

Black Obsidian — The Crystal of Protection

Black Obsidian is traditionally associated with grounding and protection. It is commonly worn as a symbolic shield against negativity, distractions and emotionally draining energy.

Together, Pyrite and Black Obsidian represent moving towards prosperity while remaining grounded and protected—the central idea behind Studd Muffyn’s Richie Rich crystal range.

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and should not be considered medical or financial guarantees.

Product Benefits

Attracts Prosperity-Inspired Energy:
Pyrite is traditionally associated with abundance, confidence and a success-focused mindset.

Supports Energetic Protection:
Black Obsidian is commonly worn as a symbolic barrier against negativity and unwanted energy.

Encourages Grounded Ambition:
The combination represents pursuing goals while staying balanced, practical and focused.

Adds a Refined Detail:
The black-toned chain and minimal crystal arrangement add character without overpowering your outfit.

Easy to Coordinate:
Pairs well with black, white, denim, beige, gold-toned and monochrome clothing.

Comfortable for Regular Styling:
Its lightweight chain design allows it to sit neatly around the ankle.

Meaningful Gifting Option:
Suitable for someone beginning a new job, business, project or personal journey.

How to Wear
Open the clasp carefully.
Place the anklet comfortably around your ankle.
Fasten the clasp securely.
Adjust the position so the crystal beads sit towards the front or outer side of the ankle.
Set an intention connected with prosperity, confidence or protection.
Remove it gently after use and store it safely.
Styling Tips

Pair the Richie Rich Anklet with cropped jeans, trousers, dresses, skirts or ankle-length ethnic wear to keep the crystal detailing visible.

For a coordinated look, style it with black footwear, metallic accessories or a Richie Rich bracelet. Its dark minimal finish works especially well with casual, street-style and monochrome outfits.

Crystal Cleansing and Recharging
Wipe the anklet gently with a clean and dry cloth.
Place it near a selenite plate or coaster for a few hours.
Keep it under soft moonlight occasionally.
Set an intention related to abundance, confidence and protection.
Avoid soaking the anklet in water.
Do not use salt, chemical cleaners or abrasive materials.
Jewellery Care
Keep the anklet away from water, sweat and excessive moisture.
Avoid direct contact with perfumes, lotions and harsh chemicals.
Remove it before bathing, swimming, exercising or sleeping.
Do not pull or twist the chain forcefully.
Open and close the clasp gently.
Wipe it with a soft, dry cloth after use.
Store it separately in a jewellery pouch to prevent scratches and tangling.
